_comment: Fixes Hub catalog (metadata + transparency). The reversible ops for each id live in Rust fix_catalog::fix_ops (capture-before + revert), proven by MockMutator tests. Applying a fix goes through the same confirm + ChangeLog + rollback pipeline as tweaks. A test enforces every id here has a fix_ops implementation.

fixes.title: Xbox Live / Teredo Repair
fixes.description: Fixes Xbox party chat and multiplayer matchmaking by restoring Teredo IPv6 tunnelling.
fixes.what: Re-enables Teredo (used by Xbox party chat and NAT traversal) and makes sure the IP Helper service is running.
fixes.changes: netsh teredo → default; HKLM\...\Tcpip6\Parameters → DisabledComponents = 0 (prior value captured); service iphlpsvc → Automatic + running. Reversible.

fixes.title: Shader Cache Clear
fixes.description: Fixes shader-compilation stutter by clearing stale GPU shader caches (they rebuild automatically).
fixes.what: Deletes the NVIDIA, AMD and DirectX shader cache folders so the driver rebuilds them cleanly.
fixes.changes: Clears %LOCALAPPDATA%\NVIDIA\DXCache & GLCache, %LOCALAPPDATA%\AMD\DxCache, %LOCALAPPDATA%\D3DSCache. Rebuilds automatically — nothing to undo.

fixes.title: Game Bar / Game DVR Repair
fixes.description: Resets Xbox Game Bar and Game DVR registry state to working defaults when the overlay is broken.
fixes.what: Restores the Game Bar / Game DVR registry values to Windows defaults so the overlay works again.
fixes.changes: GameConfigStore → GameDVR_Enabled = 1; GameBar → AppCaptureEnabled = 1; Policies\GameDVR → AllowGameDVR = 1 (prior values captured). Reversible.

fixes.title: DNS & Network Stack Reset
fixes.description: Escalating network repair: flush DNS, release/renew, then Winsock + IP reset (needs a reboot).
fixes.what: Runs the standard network repair sequence from least to most invasive; the last two steps reset the stack to defaults and need a restart.
fixes.changes: ipconfig /flushdns → /release → /renew → netsh winsock reset → netsh int ip reset. The reset steps revert the stack to Windows defaults (reboot required).

fixes.title: Network Discovery & Casting Repair
fixes.description: Makes other PCs and TVs visible again by enabling the discovery services and firewall rules.
fixes.what: Starts the Function Discovery services and enables the Network Discovery firewall rules.
fixes.changes: Services FDResPub, fdPHost, SSDPSRV → Automatic + running (prior state captured); enables the Network Discovery firewall group. Reversible.

fixes.title: System File Repair (SFC + DISM)
fixes.description: Runs Microsoft's own tools to find and repair corrupted Windows system files.
fixes.what: Runs SFC /scannow and DISM RestoreHealth — Microsoft's non-destructive repair tools that fix corrupted system files from Windows Update.
fixes.changes: sfc /scannow; dism /online /cleanup-image /restorehealth. These repair only — they don't remove your data. Runs in the background (can take several minutes).

fixes.title: Windows Update Repair
fixes.description: Fixes stuck Windows Update by resetting its cache folders and restarting the update services.
fixes.what: Stops the update services, renames the SoftwareDistribution and catroot2 caches to .bak so Windows rebuilds them, then restarts the services.
fixes.changes: Stops wuauserv/bits/cryptsvc; renames %windir%\SoftwareDistribution and %windir%\System32\catroot2 to .bak; restarts the services. Windows rebuilds the caches.

fixes.title: Microsoft Store Repair
fixes.description: Clears the Microsoft Store cache to fix download and install problems.
fixes.what: Runs wsreset to clear the Store cache — the standard fix for Store errors.
fixes.changes: wsreset.exe. Clears the Store download cache; does not remove installed apps.

fixes.title: Search Index Rebuild
fixes.description: Rebuilds the Windows Search index to fix missing or wrong search results.
fixes.what: Tells Windows Search to rebuild its index from scratch, then restarts the search service.
fixes.changes: HKLM\...\Windows Search → SetupCompletedSuccessfully = 0 (prior captured); service WSearch restarted so it rebuilds. Reversible.

fixes.title: Print Spooler Reset
fixes.description: Fixes stuck print jobs by clearing the print queue and restarting the spooler.
fixes.what: Stops the print spooler, clears the stuck print queue, and restarts it.
fixes.changes: Stops Spooler; clears %windir%\System32\spool\PRINTERS; restarts Spooler. Only queued jobs are cleared.

fixes.title: Audio Device Repair
fixes.description: Fixes 'no sound' and dead audio devices by restoring the Windows audio services.
fixes.what: Ensures the Windows Audio and Audio Endpoint Builder services are set to Automatic and running.
fixes.changes: Services Audiosrv, AudioEndpointBuilder → Automatic + running (prior state captured). Reversible.

fixes.title: Bluetooth Repair
fixes.description: Fixes Bluetooth pairing and audio by restoring the Bluetooth support services.
fixes.what: Ensures the Bluetooth Support Service and Bluetooth Audio Gateway are running.
fixes.changes: Service bthserv → Automatic + running; BTAGService → running (prior state captured). Reversible.
